ksa_text: Ability to align strategy, business objectives, and technology capabilities, integrating strategic vision, business priorities, and technical capabilities into a unified organizational direction.

dcwf.top_element_label: Engage and collaborate with allies and partners to advance shared strategic AI objectives.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: ability maps directly to AI Provider Compliance Lead scope — regulatory/compliance signals detected (core regulatory/compliance vocabulary). Composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.4553). Domain LS (affinity 0.76) aligns with primary REG competency areas. Seniority is appropriate for IC-lead-to-manager band: the KSA describes regulatory interpretation, compliance program work, or governance oversight.
